title: The 10 Best Dividend Stocks of All Time
text: Any discussion regarding the best dividend stocks of all time often starts with the Dividend Aristocrats. They are S&P 500 companies that have increased their annual dividend payment for at least 25 consecutive years.

title: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.44% and 2.06%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: ITW Reports Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., Oct. 25, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) today reported its third quarter 2022 results.

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Could Be a Great Choice
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Illinois Tool Works (ITW) have what it takes?

title: Illinois Tool (ITW) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Illinois Tool's (ITW) third-quarter 2022 earnings are expected to have benefited from diversified businesses and acquired assets. The supply-chain challenges might have hurt the same.

title: ITW Schedules Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., Oct. 04, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) will issue its third quarter 2022 results on Tuesday, October 25, 2022 at 7:00 a.m. CDT. Following the release, ITW will hold its third quarter earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT.
